title: taraxacum hohuanshanense
intro: Taraxacum hohuanshanense, also known as Hohuan Mountain dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including lowering blood pressure, improving digestion, and reducing fever. Taraxacum hohuanshanense can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also sometimes used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
